chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1382 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Disposed of case For hearing of CMA No.799/2024 (Review) 26.03.2025 Petitioner Muhammad Suleman present in person Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Abdul Rauf Kanhar, Assistant Superintend, Central Prison and Correction Facility, Khairpur on behalf of Respondents No.2, 3 and 4. >>>>>..<<<<< The Petitioner by way of listed application is seeking Review of the order dated 13.12.2023 passed by this Court, whereas, the period provided for filing such application is 20 days. The petitioner has filed the instant application on 13.02.2024, hence it is time barred by 42 days. Accordingly, the same being time barred is hereby dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
